accountErrors.note: IW-6814 not in prod. account_id tag returns 404 on all issues. Will be mapped once tag lands.

sentry.issuesNote: Sentry refresh 2026-05-01: 30 total unresolved, 6 new, 13 unhandled, 0 resolved. Top 5 issues displayed (3 new: 3A, 3B, 3D; 2 ongoing: 38, 28). Remaining 25 unresolved issues below the fold of the Sentry view; not individually tracked here.

issues.title: ConnectionError: Error while reading from 10.128.0.26:6379 — Connection reset by peer
issues.note: Redis connection reset by peer. Tied to active CIWP generation flow.

issues.title: PermissionDenied: 'aiplatform.endpoints.predict' denied on gemini-2.5-flash
issues.note: GCP IAM permission missing for gemini-2.5-flash predict. /mcp/knowledge/ingest. 0 users impacted (MCP infra).

issues.title: DefaultCredentialsError: File ./gcp-keys/service-account.json was not found
issues.note: GCP service account file missing in deploy artifact. /mcp/knowledge/ingest.

issues.title: RuntimeError: unable to perform operation on <TCPTransport closed=True reading=False>; the handler is closed
issues.note: TCPTransport closed during active generation. /api/ciwp/active-generation/{school_id}. Most users impacted of any current issue.

issues.title: HTTPException: Unexpected error: relation 'Indicators' does not exist
issues.note: Postgres UndefinedTable on Indicators table — migration gap on /api/ciwp/step-1.

dataQuality.issue: CORRECTED Apr 24: A. P. Willits Apr 13 event was mingxing@innovaresip.com (internal) in that account context — not an external activation. All 28 ciwp_generated events in prod are internal @innovaresip.com accounts. New internal testers since Apr 17 baseline: antonio+massaro1, nick, danielpinto. user_login event returning 0 results in prod — may not carry environment=production property. Fix required: is_internal super property via mixpanel.register() on login + account_name on login events.

limitations: HubSpot MCP not connected in this session; CS/Sales outreach proof is pending integration.
Internal account filtering is required before GTM action lists are production-trustworthy.

sourceMeta.tierSource: Tier classification from CS-validated CSV (Amanda, Fernando-approved 2026-04-02). 9 accounts flipped Free → Paid (Basic) based on CSV; supersedes Mixpanel plan property until IW-6811 (plan=none on login bug) ships. CSV synced 2026-05-01.

salesHotLeads.rule: Free external accounts with a validated CIWP value event. CIWP Published, sample dashboard viewed, share, or download is required before treating the account as sales-ready.
salesHotLeads.blockedReason: Waiting on is_internal/account identity filter and a validated value event before surfacing Sales leads.

csRescue.rule: Paid accounts with CIWP enabled >14 days and no CIWP event. Owner from CS classification CSV; touchpoint timestamps still pending HubSpot egress path.
csRescue.blockedReason: Owner sourced from CS classification CSV. HubSpot activity (last touch timestamp, touch type) still pending egress path.
